# Mediation {#sec-mediation}

::: {.callout-note}
Drafted by a LLM-based AI tool (Claude Code/Opus 4.8). Scaffold — an outline of intended content and its source artifacts, not finished prose.
:::

::: {.callout-important title="Causal status — [ASSOCIATION]"}
Natural direct/indirect effects are **not point-identified** here (latent general ability + same-wave mediator). This chapter is **triangulation only** — a route-compatibility check, not a route-isolating decomposition.
:::

*[Scaffold]* How much of the word-reading effect is *compatible with* flowing through a reading-route mediator. *Source:* `mediation_summary.csv` and its temporal-ordering sensitivity variant.

## The g-formula decomposition {#sec-mediation-decomposition}

*[Scaffold]* NDE/NIE by counterfactual simulation from the posterior (LRP59 count mediator; LRP62 Gaussian reading-route composite) — expect wide intervals.

## Temporal-ordering sensitivity {#sec-mediation-sensitivity}

*[Scaffold]* Whether using a strictly earlier mediator wave corroborates the direction; the bundled-design caveat (phonics + sight-word + book) means routes are compatible, not isolated.
